title: ECharts Segment 01
summary: ECharts 5.0 initial release segment covering the introduction of decal patterns for accessibility, custom series animation support (separate/combine transitions), major TypeScript type system overhaul (bundled .d.ts, missing signatures), tooltip fixes, label opacity inheritance, tree/treemap animation improvements, gauge SVG pointer defaults, build system modernization (i18n, release scripts), and several chart-type-specific bug fixes across bar, line, tree, sunburst, and sankey charts.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: ECharts 5.0 initial release segment covering the introduction of decal patterns for accessibility, custom series animation support (separate/combine transitions), major TypeScript type system overhaul (bundled .d.ts, missing signatures), tooltip fixes, label opacity inheritance, tree/treemap animation improvements, gauge SVG pointer defaults, build system modernization (i18n, release scripts), and several chart-type-specific bug fixes across bar, line, tree, sunburst, and sankey charts.

nodes.label: Core ECharts Engine
nodes.description: The main ECharts entry point and lifecycle management. PRs in this segment add lazy-mode zrender wake, geo toggle-select immediate state, parallel select opacity, release version bumps, and graph circular layout fixes.

nodes.label: Utility & Type Definitions
nodes.description: Shared utilities including types.ts, decal.ts, states.ts, time.ts, format.ts, graphic.ts, and number.ts. Heavily touched by the decal feature (none-disable, symbol-array, symbolKeepAspect), time-axis formatting, and type signature fixes.

nodes.label: Model Layer
nodes.description: Option management, series model, global model, and style mixins. Touched by the custom series animation feature, decal support integration, global defaults for decal, and palette/style mapper refactoring.

nodes.label: Data Processing
nodes.description: Data list, source management, data providers, and transform helpers. The custom series combine-animation PR and aggregate-statistics transform feature are the primary contributors here.

nodes.label: Coordinate Systems & Scales
nodes.description: Axis models, scale implementations (Time, Interval, Ordinal), coordinate system helpers, and raw extent info. Touched by timeline locale params, UTC tooltip time-axis, and the type signatures overhaul.

nodes.label: Custom Series
nodes.description: The custom series renderer. The major combine/separate animation feature and decal support for custom series produce the bulk of changes in this module.

nodes.label: Gauge Chart
nodes.description: Gauge series model and view. Touched by SVG pointer defaults fix and type signature improvements for gauge-specific options.

nodes.label: Tree & Sunburst Charts
nodes.description: Tree chart view, treemap view/series, and sunburst series/view. Impacted by treemap click-during-animation fix, tree animation config parity, tree symbol none skip, and label opacity inheritance.

nodes.label: Bar Chart & Chart Helpers
nodes.description: Bar/PictorialBar series and views, plus shared chart helpers (Symbol, Line, enableAriaDecalForTree, pieHelper). Touched by PictorialBar hover animation default, symbol rotation rendering, and label opacity fixes.

nodes.label: Line Chart
nodes.description: Line series and view. Touched by line emphasis width threshold fix and visual regression interaction improvements.

nodes.label: Graph & Sankey Charts
nodes.description: Graph and sankey series, views, and layout algorithms. The type-definition overhaul and decal support propagation are the main changes.

nodes.label: Tooltip Component
nodes.description: Tooltip HTML/rich content rendering and tooltip view logic. Fixes for hide-on-leave behavior, text-shadow restoration, and UTC time display.

nodes.label: Other Components
nodes.description: DataZoom, timeline, legend, geo, marker, and other components. Touched by datazoom brush-rect refresh, datazoom duplicate declaration, timeline tick symbol position, legend scroll animation, and geo map click NPE.

nodes.label: Label System
nodes.description: Label manager and label style utilities. The label opacity inheritance and rich opacity override fixes are the primary changes.

nodes.label: Visual Mapping & Decal
nodes.description: Visual mapping, aria visual, decal visual, and style visual processors. Core of the decal feature implementation and custom series decal support.

nodes.label: Render Pipeline
nodes.description: Scheduler, task system, layout/points processors, data processors, and preprocessors. Touched by the custom series animation feature and the bundled .d.ts distribution refactor.

nodes.label: Build System
nodes.description: Build scripts (config, release, i18n, dev-fast), license headers, and pre-publish tooling. Covers the i18n build folder fix, Windows build compatibility, release automation, and the 5.0.0-rc3 release pipeline.

nodes.label: Assets & i18n
nodes.description: Map data (GeoJSON/JS), theme files, and i18n locale bundles. The map data test folder PR moves China map data, and the theme deprecated usage PR updates dark theme references.

edges.label: core imports utility types and helpers
model layer uses shared types and utility functions
data layer depends on model definitions
coordinate systems use shared type definitions
visual processors use decal utilities and type defs
custom series depends on model and data APIs
custom series uses data list for rendering
chart helpers use decal and visual state utilities
tree/treemap charts use label style system
pipeline scheduled by core echarts lifecycle
tooltip uses format and time utilities
label system uses graphic and state utilities
graph/sankey use shared chart helpers (Symbol, Line)
build scripts produce i18n bundles and process assets
components register with and extend core API
